commit.message:
feat(package-search): auto-detect Solr parser mode for unknown portals

Run a probe query (data OR dati, 2 parallel rows=0 calls) on first use of
any portal not explicitly configured in portals.json. If text:(...)
returns >2x more results than the default parser, mark the portal as
needing force_text_field and cache for session lifetime.

Fixes silent 0-result OR queries on portals with old CKAN/Solr (missing
df=text fix from ckan/ckan#4376). Confirmed broken in GUI too — server-side
Solr config issue, not fixable client-side for the web UI.

Also adds force_text_field:true to data.gov.uk, catalog.data.gov,
open.canada.ca in portals.json (known affected portals).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: 悬浮小助手升级 - 第一阶段完成（多对话管理+角色切换+快捷指令）

核心功能：
- 多对话管理：左侧对话列表，支持创建、切换、删除、重命名
- 对话持久化：后端数据库存储（assistant_conversations、assistant_messages表）
- 角色切换：科研人员/施工人员/项目汇报三种模式，AI回答风格自动调整
- 快捷指令：右侧快捷面板，预设常用问题（生成报告、检查异常、预测趋势等）
- 三栏布局：对话列表 + 对话视图 + 快捷面板

后端改动：
- 新增数据库表：assistant_conversations、assistant_messages
- 新增API：对话CRUD、消息发送（支持角色参数）
- 新增db_service.py：数据库服务层
- 增强api.py：根据角色调整system prompt

前端改动：
- 重构FloatingAssistant.tsx：从单对话框升级为多对话管理系统
- 新增组件：AssistantPanel、ConversationList、ConversationView、RoleSwitcher、QuickCommandPanel
- 新增类型定义：types.ts（Conversation、Message、Role等）
- 新增API客户端：api.ts（对话和消息的CRUD操作）
- 新增配置文件：config.ts（快捷指令、角色配置）

技术栈：
- 后端：Python + Flask + MySQL
- 前端：React + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS
- UI风格：深色科技风（cyan + slate）

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: wrap all .toFixed() calls with Number() to prevent TypeError on string values

APIs may return numeric values as strings (e.g. "7302.9" instead of 7302.9).
Wrapping with Number() ensures .toFixed() always receives a number.
Affects 33 files across pages, dashboard KPIs, and TMS modules.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(direction): ensure pipeline diversity in snippets and engage suggestions

- gatherer: select up to 3 snippets per pipeline via window function instead
  of taking 15 most recent globally — prevents active pipelines (fiction,
  culture) from crowding out quieter ones (ai-news, pm-blogs)
- gatherer: surface pipeline_id on each snippet
- prompts: show [pipeline_id] label on each snippet so Claude knows the
  category distribution it's working with
- prompts: cap fiction at 1 of 2 engage slots; require category diversity
- prompts: expand engage definition — response articles, LinkedIn citations,
  and X mentions are all valid, not just Substack comment replies

- Israel strikes 5 Iranian oil facilities (first time) — energy war now bilateral
- Assembly of Experts reaches consensus on Khamenei successor
- Ramada Hotel Beirut strike (~200 Hezbollah killed), 2 IDF KIA, Lebanon 394 dead

feat: PR-2.1 file UI — MultimodalTextbox, drag-and-drop, approval bar

Both modes now accept file attachments via gr.MultimodalTextbox:
- Workbench: replaces gr.Textbox inside gr.ChatInterface; paperclip
  upload icon (left) and native ↑ submit icon (right)
- SEO Coach: replaces gr.Textbox with submit_btn=False; external custom
  submit button kept; Dutch labels (Bevestigen / Verwijder)

Both modes get native drag-and-drop and file chip display above the
text field (gr.MultimodalTextbox built-in behaviour).

Approval bar (gr.Group, visible=False) shows filename + confirm/cancel
on file attach. Auto-approves for PR-2.1; Docling wired in PR-2.2.

Files list stored in pending_files state; cleared on message submit.
None guard in on_seo_input_change eliminates 11 spurious run/predict
calls during Gradio component initialization.

Accepted types: .pdf .docx .txt .md (file_count="single")
Handler signatures updated: str → Union[str, dict] via _extract_message()

Tests: 334 passed, 0 failed

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

bump: v8.1.6 — fix LED metrics not flowing on autostart

_on_device_poll auto-selected LED devices but never called
mediator.ensure_running(), so MetricsMediator never started and the
display showed all zeros until the user manually clicked the device
button. The manual click path in _on_device_widget_clicked already had
the ensure_running() call — this adds it to the auto-select path too.

commit.message:
fix: include input_tokens in message_delta SSE event

When converting OpenAI SSE to Anthropic format, the message_start
event has input_tokens=0 because OpenAI provides usage in the last
chunk. Include the final input_tokens in message_delta so downstream
consumers can get accurate token counts.

commit.message:
feat: topic chat (DeepSeek) + rewrite Science T1 questions

- Add POST /api/chat server endpoint using DeepSeek API
  • System prompt enforces topic-specific, Singapore Gen Z slang, max 3 sentences
  • Keeps last 10 messages for conversation context
  • DEEPSEEK_API_KEY env var (set in Railway)

- New TopicChat.jsx floating chat button on every topic page
  • Opens as fixed bottom-right panel
  • Animated typing indicator, smooth scroll to latest message
  • Enter to send, accent-coloured UI matching current profile

- Update api.js: add chatWithTutor() fetch helper

- Rewrite Science Topic 1 (Scientific Endeavour) with 150 Singapore-exam-aligned MCQs
  • GHS hazard symbols (20q): all 9 symbols, oxidising vs flammable distinction
  • Bunsen burner (15q): safety/heating/roaring flames, hottest point, soot causes
  • Lab equipment & parallax error (15q): meniscus, parallax direction, Vernier vs ruler
  • Vernier caliper (15q): zero error correction formula, internal jaws, precision
  • SI units & prefixes (20q): base units, conversions, km/h→m/s, scientific notation
  • Accuracy/precision & variables (13q): IV/DV/CV, hypothesis format, fair test
  • Speed calculations (20q): v=d/t, unit conversions, average speed traps
  • Distance-time graphs (20q): gradient=speed, crossing lines=same position, curvature

- Fix hardcoded "Math Portal / Sec 1 G3" header in Dashboard + TopicDetail
  → Now dynamic: subject.title / subject.subtitle

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: close remaining 6 technical hardening gaps for go-live readiness

Addresses all open items from the revised hardening master plan:

- Gap 1 (CRITICAL): TAP fail-close — reject requests in prod when no JWKS
  provider configured; add max_stale_seconds for JWKS cache expiry; add
  production guard warning in lifespan startup
- Gap 2 (CRITICAL): External wallet checkout on-chain verification — verify
  tx receipt, Transfer event, recipient, and amount via RPC before marking
  session as paid
- Gap 3 (HIGH): One-path execution — route A2A /messages and AP2 /execute
  through ControlPlane for unified anomaly engine, kill switch, and receipt
  generation across all payment flows
- Gap 4 (HIGH): Root packaging — bump requires-python to >=3.12, add
  sardis-api tests to CI pipeline
- Gap 5 (MEDIUM): Contract lifecycle metadata — add ContractLifecycle enum
  and per-contract lifecycle field to all deployment manifests
- Gap 6 (MEDIUM): Ledger inclusion proofs — replace dict lookup with real
  Merkle proof verification in verify_entry(); add verifyProof() to
  SardisLedgerAnchor.sol for on-chain dispute resolution

commit.message:
docs: specs/032-overmind-coordinator — full Adjutant vision spec suite

Four spec documents covering the complete Adjutant coordinator history and roadmap:

- spec-phase1.md: Original adj-051 design (agent + scheduler + health monitor)
- spec-051.5.md: Event-driven restructure with pluggable behaviors

commit.message:
Claude/fix chat UI mic hk xm0 (#24)

* Fix Chat AI: align questions with survey, upgrade model, fix mic errors

- Rewrote CHAT_SYSTEM_PROMPT to ask all 16 scorecard questions across
  Basic/Marketing/Sales/Delivery/Operations departments — matching the
  survey exactly so both paths produce comparable scores
- Upgraded lead-chat API from gpt-4o-mini → gpt-4o for stronger
  conversational reasoning
- Fixed mic/STT: wrapped recognition.start() in try/catch, added
  interimResults=false, and show inline error messages for denied
  permission, no-speech, and unsupported browsers instead of silent
  failures

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Rs4jUUFUtiByRCvLgzrvdz

* Replace Web Speech API with MediaRecorder + OpenAI Whisper for mic

Web Speech API silently fails on custom domains (no browser permission
prompt, no visible error). Replaced with:
- navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia() — triggers a real browser
  permission dialog the user can actually see and approve
- MediaRecorder to capture audio (webm/ogg)
- /api/transcribe endpoint that sends audio to OpenAI Whisper-1
- Button shows red pulsing while recording, gold spinner while
  transcribing, and clear inline error messages for denied permission
  or failed transcription

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Rs4jUUFUtiByRCvLgzrvdz

* Fix mic: remove stray conflict marker, detect blocked permission state

Shows actionable message with lock icon instructions when browser
has previously denied mic access rather than silently failing.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Rs4jUUFUtiByRCvLgzrvdz

* Fix mic: allow microphone in Permissions-Policy (was blocked site-wide)

Permissions-Policy: microphone=() was disabling getUserMedia for ALL origins
including self, which silently blocked the mic button before JS even ran.
Changed to microphone=(self) so the scorecard chat can use the mic.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Rs4jUUFUtiByRCvLgzrvdz

* Add LinkedIn Insight Tag and Microsoft Clarity placeholders

- LinkedIn partner ID 9703625 installed via afterInteractive Script
- Clarity scaffold ready — activate by setting CLARITY_ID

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Rs4jUUFUtiByRCvLgzrvdz

* Enable Microsoft Clarity (vsinfwt5xe)

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Rs4jUUFUtiByRCvLgzrvdz

* Fix Vercel build: self-host Comfortaa font, fix conditional hooks

- Remove next/font/google (Comfortaa) — was failing to fetch at build time
  on Vercel, crashing every production deploy for the past 2+ hours
- Load Comfortaa via <link> CDN tag instead; set --font-comfortaa in CSS
- Fix scorecard-results/page.tsx: useState/useEffect were called after an
  early return, violating Rules of Hooks — moved them before the guard

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Rs4jUUFUtiByRCvLgzrvdz

* Add /admin Business Health Dashboard with conversion funnel

- Password-protected /admin via middleware (ADMIN_PASSWORD env var)
- /admin — funnel dashboard: Ad Spend → Clicks → Pageviews →
  Scorecard starts/completions → Checkout → Purchases → Discovery calls
- /admin/integrations — connection status for all data sources
- /api/admin/funnel — Stripe live data (checkout starts, purchases,
  revenue); GA4/LinkedIn/Calendly slots ready to connect
- /api/admin/auth — login/logout with httpOnly cookie
- Date range selector: 7d / 30d / 90d

To activate: add ADMIN_PASSWORD + LINKEDIN_AD_SPEND to Vercel env vars

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Rs4jUUFUtiByRCvLgzrvdz

* Fix Microsoft Clarity tracking — interpolate project ID correctly

The Clarity script ID was inside a nested template literal, causing it
to render as the literal string '${CLARITY_ID}' instead of 'vsinfwt5xe'.
Replaced with the hardcoded ID so the tag fires correctly on every page load.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Rs4jUUFUtiByRCvLgzrvdz

* Add robust GA4 + LinkedIn conversion tracking

- begin_checkout: fires to GA4 (with ecommerce params) on every CTA button click,
  across both CTAButton and NavCheckoutButton
- purchase: fires on Stripe success return via new useConversionTracking hook,
  which reads ?status=success&session_id=... from the URL, dedupes via
  sessionStorage, fires GA4 purchase event ($1,200 ecommerce data) + LinkedIn
  conversion, then cleans the URL with history.replaceState
- LinkedIn conversion stub added to trackPurchase — set LINKEDIN_PURCHASE_CONVERSION_ID
  in analytics.ts once the conversion is created in Campaign Manager

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Rs4jUUFUtiByRCvLgzrvdz

* fix: flush GA4 begin_checkout event before Stripe navigation

Replaces direct window.location.href assignment with navigateAfterTracking()
which uses gtag's event_callback to delay navigation until GA4 has flushed
the event queue, with a 300ms timeout fallback. Fixes begin_checkout being
dropped on page unload.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Rs4jUUFUtiByRCvLgzrvdz

* Add Resend email on purchase — confirmation + Mike notification

- Install resend package
- Fix webhook to use RESEND_API_KEY (was RESEND_API_KEY_TOKEN)
- Fix from address to hello@rehabit.biz (verified domain)
- Add buyer confirmation email with next steps
- Add internal notification to mike@rehabit.us on each purchase
- Make webhook work without STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET set yet

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Rs4jUUFUtiByRCvLgzrvdz

* Fix webhook env vars + add video play/progress tracking

- Use RESEND_API_KEY_TOKEN and LEAD_NOTIFY_EMAIL to match Vercel env vars
- Add video_play and video_progress (25/50/75/100%) events to analytics
- Wire VideoPlayer to fire tracking on play and timeupdate

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Rs4jUUFUtiByRCvLgzrvdz

* Add .mcp.json — Vercel and Stripe MCP servers for Claude Code

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Rs4jUUFUtiByRCvLgzrvdz

* Fix admin auth flow — login page standalone, secure session token

- layout.tsx: skip nav render on /admin/login (was showing signed-in UI to unauthenticated users)
- auth/route.ts: store SHA-256 session token in cookie instead of raw password
- middleware.ts: validate against derived token (matches new cookie value)

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Rs4jUUFUtiByRCvLgzrvdz

* Add GA4 integration + fix admin auth consistency

- src/lib/adminAuth.ts: shared helper for cookie token validation (SHA-256)
- src/lib/ga4.ts: GA4 Data API client — pageviews, scorecard starts/completions, CTA clicks
- funnel/route.ts: wire in GA4 metrics; fix auth to use isAdminAuthenticated()
- integrations/page.tsx: require both GOOGLE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_JSON + GA4_PROPERTY_ID
- package.json: add @google-analytics/data@5.2.1

Requires GA4_PROPERTY_ID + GOOGLE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_JSON in Vercel env vars.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Rs4jUUFUtiByRCvLgzrvdz

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
Co-authored-by: Mike Olaski <mikeolaski@MBP-di-Mike.home>

commit.message:
fix: teams live-reload on every API call + whitelist sub-agent terminal statuses

TeamsStore now re-scans ~/.claude/teams/ on every summaries()/get()/inbox()
call instead of loading once at startup. Teams created mid-session are now
immediately visible without server restart.

Sub-agent status handling switches from blacklist (only async_launched kept
running) to whitelist (only completed/failed/killed are terminal). This
prevents teammate_spawned and future unknown statuses from being incorrectly
marked as errors.

Fix web.config: remove hardcoded Node.js path so IISNode uses system PATH

may not exist on the Azure instance. Removing it lets IISNode find Node.js
via the runtime stack configured in Azure App Service settings.
